summary: Role-based access control and Auto-Reorder features tested successfully. All 21 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified owner sees 23 nav items, staff sees 13 nav items with 10 owner-only items correctly hidden. Staff correctly redirected from /products and /reorder routes. Reorder page PO creation workflow working correctly.
passed_tests: Owner login with owner@grillshack.nz / GrillShack2026! - SUCCESS
Staff login with staff@grillshack.nz / Staff2026! - SUCCESS
Owner sees 23 nav items including all owner-only pages - SUCCESS
Staff sees 13 nav items (10 owner-only items hidden) - SUCCESS
Staff cannot see: Products, Calculator, Allocation, Cashflow, Scale, Margin, Staff, Suppliers, Reorder, Markets - SUCCESS
Staff redirected from /products route to / - SUCCESS
Staff redirected from /reorder route to / - SUCCESS
Owner can access /reorder page with data-testid='reorder-page' - SUCCESS
Reorder page shows 10 low-stock products with suggestions - SUCCESS
PO creation dialog opens with Generate Purchase Order button - SUCCESS
PO creation successful with toast confirmation - SUCCESS

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all role-based restrictions and reorder page working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Role-based access control fully implemented and tested. Owner sees 23 nav items, staff sees 13 (10 owner-only items hidden: Products, Calculator, Allocation, Cashflow, Scale, Margin, Staff, Suppliers, Reorder, Markets). Backend require_owner() middleware correctly returns 403 for staff on protected endpoints. Auto-Reorder page at /reorder shows low-stock products with suggestions, allows PO creation with status workflow (pending->ordered->received). All 10 products currently have 0 stock with reorder_point=10, so all appear in suggestions.
